name: 3pc Vacation Inflatable Volleyball Pool Set Yellow/Green - Roller Rabbit x Target
description:
Bring some friendly competition to your next pool party with this 3-Piece Inflatable Volleyball Pool Set from Roller Rabbit x Target. This pool volleyball set includes a ball, net and convenient carrying bag.

Beloved for their colorful prints and uplifting styles, Roller Rabbit adds more joy to any journey. Now, they’re joining Target to celebrate travel, friendship and togetherness in this limited-edition collection designed to inspire your ultimate spring adventure.
